gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/355)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (24/355)
text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) مَنْ حَلَفَ فَقَالَ لَا وَ رَبِّ الْمُصْحَفِ فَحَنِثَ فَعَلَيْهِ كَفَّارَةٌ وَاحِدَةٌ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The one who swears, so he says, ‘No, by the Lord<sup>azwj</sup> of the Parchment’. So he reneges, so upon him is one expiation’.
en.sarwar: 8. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father from af-Nawfaliy from af-Sakuniy who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, has said that ’Amir al-Mu’minin, Ali, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one swears saying, “No, by the Lord of the book”, then opposes it, he must pay one Kaffarah (expiation).”’
